summary: Iteration_9 focused regression for QS Estimator: new Abstract & BOQ Template tab, preset selector (Villa applied), and Excel/PDF exports. Backend regression (qs workflow + weather fallback) re-run: 10/10 pytest passed. Frontend Playwright on public URL: 15/15 steps passed including Villa preset application (floors->2, bedrooms->3), all abstract rows A-N, grand total row, 14 basic rate rows, all detailed BOQ sections A-N, measurement edit/undo/redo/save, Excel & PDF downloads triggered without errors.
action_items: Optional maintainability (carry-over): /app/frontend/src/pages/QSEstimatorPage.jsx is now ~1667 lines; consider splitting into MeasurementSheet, AbstractTab, BoqGenerator, Exports sub-components.

Optional: hardcoded BASIC_RATES values in qsAbstractTemplate.js are reasonable defaults but UI does not yet expose them as editable per-project (description in code says editable). Consider wiring to project state if business needs it.
critical_code_review_comments: qsAbstractTemplate.js is well-structured, pure-functional, no side effects — good separation.
buildAbstract sums measurements by row.category which exactly matches categories used in qsAutoGenerator (verified: A-J + K-N populated after auto-generate).
splitRowAcrossFloors divides quantity/amount evenly across floors — assumes uniform distribution; acceptable for template defaults but worth flagging in UI when actual floors differ in size.
Excel & PDF export buttons fire downloads cleanly with no JS console errors; suggested filenames derived from project_name.
Preset selector correctly updates floors, rooms, rate_profile and shows toast — verified Villa preset (floors=2, bedrooms=3).
No MOCKED APIs in this iteration. Weather fallback continues to behave as designed.
test_credentials: No auth required (public endpoints). /app/memory/test_credentials.md not consulted as not needed.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER9_Villa project + Rev-1 via UI through public URL. Inline measurement upserts via test_qs_workflow.py for transient rows prefixed TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://civeng-calc.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest 10/10 (qs_workflow + qs_weather_regression). Frontend Playwright covered: preset selector (Villa), abstract tab rendering A-N + grand total + 14 basic rates + detailed BOQ A-N, measurement add/undo/redo/save, BOQ tab, Excel + PDF download triggers. New file /app/frontend/src/utils/qsAbstractTemplate.js is the source-of-truth for abstract structure — modify there if section codes/notes/basic-rates need to change.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all targeted regression and new-feature tests passed.
